title: EphemeralFrame
description:
The JSON body carried in the data: field of an `event: ephemeral` SSE frame. The frame on the wire is `event: ephemeral
data: <this-object>

` with NO id: line (Ephemeral events are never sequenced or persisted). kind selects how delta decodes; header is the producing event's identity; delta is absent for input_queued.

delta.description: Kind-specific payload. For token_delta a tagged chunk DTO ({chunk_type, ...}); for tool_call_started/completed the tool-call delta; for compaction_started the attempt id, reason, and basis; absent for input_queued.
